task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra (Electronics). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $999.00 and wholesale is $839.00. Product features: Smartphone with 200MP camera and S Pen functionality. Reference: https://www.samsung.com/us/smartphones/galaxy-s25-ultra/

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
